links.context: Abraham is the father of all the faithful ([[ROM.4:11]]). Since he built an altar of
Gentiles, to be made righteous by faith in the gospel (v. 3; see also [[ROM.4:9]]-17). Christ
of God's promises to Israel in the Church, see the following passages: [[ROM.4:9]]-16; 9:6, 8, 23-27; 11:7; [[1CO.10:18]]; [[GAL.6:16]]; [[1PE.2:4]]-12; [[REV.3:12]]; 21:2, 10.
